version.version_stdout: curl 8.10.1 (x86_64-pc-linux-gnu) libcurl/8.10.1 OpenSSL/3.0.14 zlib/1.2.13 brotli/1.0.9 zstd/1.5.4 libpsl/0.21.2

usage: tigrcorn [-h] [--transport {tcp,udp,unix,pipe}] [--host HOST]
                [--port PORT] [--uds UDS] [--lifespan {auto,on,off}]
                [--log-level LOG_LEVEL] [--no-access-log] [--factory]
                [--ssl-certfile SSL_CERTFILE] [--ssl-keyfile SSL_KEYFILE]
                [--ssl-ca-certs SSL_CA_CERTS] [--ssl-require-client-cert]
                [--http {1.1,2,3}]
                [--protocol {http1,http2,http3,quic,websocket,rawframed,custom}]
                [--disable-websocket] [--disable-h2c]
                [--max-body-size MAX_BODY_SIZE] [--quic-secret QUIC_SECRET]
                [--quic-require-retry] [--pipe-mode {rawframed,stream}]
                app

ASGI3-compatible transport server

positional arguments:
  app                   Application import string in module:attr form

options:
  -h, --help            show this help message and exit
  --transport {tcp,udp,unix,pipe}
  --host HOST           Bind host for TCP/UDP listeners
  --port PORT           Bind port for TCP/UDP listeners
  --uds UDS             Bind Unix domain socket or pipe path instead of
                        TCP/UDP
  --lifespan {auto,on,off}
  --log-level LOG_LEVEL
  --no-access-log
  --factory             Treat APP as an application factory
  --ssl-certfile SSL_CERTFILE
                        Certificate for TLS on TCP/Unix or QUIC-TLS on UDP
  --ssl-keyfile SSL_KEYFILE
                        Private key for TLS on TCP/Unix or QUIC-TLS on UDP
  --ssl-ca-certs SSL_CA_CERTS
                        Trusted CA bundle for TLS or QUIC-TLS client
                        certificate verification
  --ssl-require-client-cert
                        Require peer client certificates for TLS or QUIC-TLS
                        listeners
  --http {1.1,2,3}      Enable an HTTP version
  --protocol {http1,http2,http3,quic,websocket,rawframed,custom}
                        Enable a listener protocol
  --disable-websocket
  --disable-h2c
  --max-body-size MAX_BODY_SIZE
  --quic-secret QUIC_SECRET
                        Shared secret for local QUIC experiments when not
                        using QUIC-TLS certificates
  --quic-require-retry  Require a QUIC Retry before completing the initial
                        handshake
  --pipe-mode {rawframed,stream}
